title: Kambalakonda Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Kambalakonda Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: The Kambalakonda Wildlife Sanctuary is a forest situated near Visakhapatnam.
overview.description: The Kambalakonda Wildlife Sanctuary is a forest situated near Visakhapatnam. It has been under the control of Andhra Pradesh Forest Department since 10 March 1970. Earlier the land was under the control of Maharajah of Vizianagaram. It was named after the nearby hillock Kambalakonda.

topPlaces.name: Kommadi
topPlaces.description: Kommadi is a suburb of the city of Visakhapatnam state of Andhra Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Visakhapatnam (urban) mandal
topPlaces.description: Visakhapatnam (urban) mandal is one of the 43 mandals in Visakhapatnam district of Andhra Pradesh in India. It is administered under Visakhapatnam revenue division and its headquarters are located at Visakhapatnam.

topPlaces.name: Sontyam
topPlaces.description: Sontyam is a neighbourhood in the city of Visakhapatnam, state of Andhra Pradesh, India. It is a suburb of the city.

topPlaces.name: Gudilova
topPlaces.description: Gudilova is a Neighbourhood of Visakhapatnam city, Visakhapatnam district. It lies between the hill area of Kambalakonda Wildlife Sanctuary which lies in the family of Eastern Ghats.

topPlaces.name: Shilparamam Jathara
topPlaces.description: Shilparamam Jathara is an arts and crafts village and Sculpture park located in Madhurawada, Visakhapatnam, India. The village was conceived with an idea to create an environment for the preservation of traditional crafts.

topPlaces.name: Pothinamallayya Palem
topPlaces.description: Pothinamallayya Palem or PM Palem, is a residential neighbourhood situated in Visakhapatnam city in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in the Greater Visakhapatnam Municipal Corporation area.

topPlaces.name: Madhurawada
topPlaces.description: Madhurawada is a major business and residential area of Visakhapatnam in the state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located on the Visakhapatnam-Vizianagaram stretch of National Highway 16 around 16 km from the city center of Visakhapatnam.

topPlaces.name: ACA–VDCA Cricket Stadium
topPlaces.description: ACA–VDCA Cricket Stadium (stands for Andhra Cricket Association–Visakhapatnam District Cricket Association Cricket Stadium) is a multi-purpose stadium in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India. It is primarily used for international cricket matches.

items.note: Kommadi is a suburb of the city of Visakhapatnam state of Andhra Pradesh, India.

Visakhapatnam (urban) mandal is one of the 43 mandals in Visakhapatnam district of Andhra Pradesh in India. It is administered under Visakhapatnam revenue division and its headquarters are located at Visakhapatnam.
Sontyam is a neighbourhood in the city of Visakhapatnam, state of Andhra Pradesh, India. It is a suburb of the city.
Gudilova is a Neighbourhood of Visakhapatnam city, Visakhapatnam district. It lies between the hill area of Kambalakonda Wildlife Sanctuary which lies in the family of Eastern Ghats.

Shilparamam Jathara is an arts and crafts village and Sculpture park located in Madhurawada, Visakhapatnam, India. The village was conceived with an idea to create an environment for the preservation of traditional crafts.

Pothinamallayya Palem or PM Palem, is a residential neighbourhood situated in Visakhapatnam city in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in the Greater Visakhapatnam Municipal Corporation area.

Madhurawada is a major business and residential area of Visakhapatnam in the state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located on the Visakhapatnam-Vizianagaram stretch of National Highway 16 around 16 km from the city center of Visakhapatnam.

ACA–VDCA Cricket Stadium (stands for Andhra Cricket Association–Visakhapatnam District Cricket Association Cricket Stadium) is a multi-purpose stadium in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India. It is primarily used for international cricket matches.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kambalakonda Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kambalakonda Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kambalakonda Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (15 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (11 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kambalakonda Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kambalakonda Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kambalakonda Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Kambalakonda Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kambalakonda Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kommadi, Visakhapatnam (urban) mandal, Sontyam, Gudilova, Shilparamam Jathara.
